parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE personas (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  ig_account_id TEXT UNIQUE,
  timezone TEXT NOT NULL,
  awake_start TEXT NOT NULL,
  awake_end TEXT NOT NULL,
  per_user_daily_cap INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
  global_daily_cap INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 200
);

CREATE TABLE users (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  platform_username TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE conversations (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id TEXT REFERENCES users(id),
  persona_id TEXT REFERENCES personas(id),
  manual_mode BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  last_message_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  last_summarized_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  summary_text TEXT,
  replies_today INT DEFAULT 0,
  replies_today_date DATE,
  pending_wake_reply BOOLEAN DEFAULT false
);

CREATE TABLE messages (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  conversation_id TEXT REFERENCES conversations(id),
  role TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (role IN ('user','assistant')),
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  platform_message_id TEXT UNIQUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE girl_daily_limits (
  persona_id TEXT REFERENCES personas(id),
  date DATE,
  total_auto_replies INT DEFAULT 0,
  PRIMARY KEY (persona_id, date)
);

INSERT INTO personas (id, name, ig_account_id, timezone, awake_start, awake_end, per_user_daily_cap, global_daily_cap) VALUES
('maeve', 'Maeve', '17841478136820581', 'Europe/Dublin', '08:00', '01:00', 10, 150),
('elara', 'Elara', NULL, 'Europe/Oslo', '07:00', '23:00', 10, 150),
('amara', 'Amara', NULL, 'Africa/Lagos', '08:00', '00:00', 10, 150);
SELECT id FROM personas WHERE ig_account_id = '{{ $('Set Fields').item.json.igAccountId }}';

INSERT INTO conversations (id, user_id, persona_id, last_message_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Set Fields').item.json.otherPartyId }}:{{ $('Resolve Persona').item.json.id }}',
  '{{ $('Set Fields').item.json.otherPartyId }}',
  '{{ $('Resolve Persona').item.json.id }}',
  now()
)
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE
  SET last_message_at = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $('Set Fields').item.json.role }}' = 'fan' THEN now()
    ELSE conversations.last_message_at
  END;

INSERT INTO messages (conversation_id, role, content, platform_message_id, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Set Fields').item.json.otherPartyId }}:{{ $('Resolve Persona').item.json.id }}',
  '{{ $('Set Fields').item.json.role }}',
  '{{ $('Set Fields').item.json.text }}',
  '{{ $('Set Fields').item.json.mid }}',
  to_timestamp({{ $('Set Fields').item.json.eventTimestamp }}::bigint / 1000.0)
)
ON CONFLICT (platform_message_id) DO NOTHING;

SELECT
  relname AS table_name,
  pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size(relid)) AS size
FROM pg_catalog.pg_statio_user_tables
ORDER BY pg_total_relation_size(relid) DESC;
